home.title: Art-Labyrinth Summer Festival
home.subtitle: Annual festival of art, music and mindfulness

about.title: About the Festival
about.text_1: Art-Labyrinth Summer Festival is an annual event founded in 2008. Each year we bring together people ready to unite in the pursuit of inspiration, creativity and mindfulness.
about.text_2: The festival takes place on the scenic banks of the Dniester River in Moldova. It is a space for transformation, exchange of ideas and inspiration, where art, music and nature merge in a single flow.
about.text_3: We bring together artists, musicians, craftspeople, volunteers and dreamers — everyone ready to create something great together.
